name: agent_task_store
description: Store a task record in the agent's personal task tracking system. Used by agents to track their own task-related activities, reporting history, or personal task queue. Each agent maintains separate task storage.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task being stored

task_data.description: Task data to store (flexible structure based on agent needs)

status.description: Task status (e.g., pending, completed, error, reported)

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this record was created/updated

metadata.description: Additional metadata specific to the agent's use case

context.description: Storage context/category for organizing different types of agent tasks

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite existing task with same ID
